title: A New Neighbor
content: Last week, a new neighbor moved into the apartment next to Mia’s. His name was Lucas, and he seemed friendly. On Saturday morning, Mia saw him carrying heavy boxes up the stairs. She offered to help, and he thanked her with a smile. Inside the apartment, there were books, plants, and several guitars. Lucas explained that he was a music teacher. Later that evening, Mia heard soft guitar music through the wall. She smiled while making dinner and thought that maybe having a new neighbor would be nice.
